title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
description: Teen Miles Morales becomes Spider-Man and joins other Spider-People across the multiverse.

title: Inception
description: A skilled thief enters dreams to steal secrets but faces a dangerous mission.

title: La La Land
description: A jazz musician and an aspiring actress fall in love while chasing their dreams.

title: Paddington 2
description: Paddington gets framed for a crime and his friends work to clear his name.

title: Get Out
description: A man uncovers disturbing secrets when visiting his girlfriend's family.

title: Interstellar
description: A team travels through a wormhole to find a new home for humanity.

title: Knives Out
description: A detective investigates a wealthy family's mysterious death.

title: Inside Out
description: A girl's emotions struggle to guide her through a major life change.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
description: Max helps rebels escape a tyrant in a high-speed desert chase.

title: Coco
description: A boy enters the Land of the Dead to uncover his family's history.
